architectureDecision.label: Split maintainer-gates (requiresDist)
architectureDecision.rationale: When artifact exists, run metadata-only maintainer-gates; run requiresDist gates only when dist not already validated.

readyReview.decision: Release-readiness keeps current surface minus duplicate pack/build; maintainer-gates split by requiresDist.

technicalBreakdown: Classify maintainer-gates scripts into requiresDist vs metadata-only.
Release-readiness downloads artifact and skips rebuild/pack when present.
Run requiresDist gates only when not satisfied by prior CI code path.
Preserve release diff base SHA behavior on push/release refs.

acceptanceCriteria: Release-readiness does not duplicate build or pack when a validated artifact exists.
Maintainer-gates split: metadata-only always runs; requiresDist runs when needed.
Release diff allowlist receives correct base SHA on push and release refs.
Release-readiness evidence identifies the artifact SHA validated.
